new_value: Guarantor may not seek to consolidate any action in which jury trial has been waived with any other action in which jury trial cannot be or has not been waived.
reason: Regression recovery: gold had consolidationWaiver=true. Verified in Exhibit N, Unlimited Guaranty Section 18, page 213. Directly surfaced clause within jury trial waiver paragraph.

new_value: 15% per annum or highest legal rate (franchise agreement Section 8(c))
reason: Adjudicated: gold says SOFR+5% for late payment interest. FDD Franchise Agreement Section 8(c), page 77, clearly states '15% per annum' or highest legal rate with monthly compounding. SOFR+5% appears nowhere in the FDD. Gold-source error.
Adjudicated: Full-text search of all 389 pages found no $200 insufficient funds fee line item in Item 6 or anywhere else. Gold-source error — fee not directly surfaced in this FDD.

new_value: Not a separate fee in FDD — royalty reset on transfer is the economic consequence
reason: Adjudicated: No 'Transfer Fee' line item in Item 6 fee table or franchise agreement. Gold likely confused royalty reset provision (Section 15(d)) with a separate fee. Gold-source error.
